_comment: SPEC REFERENCE ONLY — not a machine-driven test fixture. These vectors are human-readable representations of OpenPGP card spec v3.4 APDU sequences for review and documentation. The actual test oracle is the hardcoded hex in test/wp11_test_openpgp.c, which was derived from the same spec. A JSON parser was not added to the C test suite because: (1) no JSON library is available without adding a dependency, (2) writing a custom parser in C adds ~200 LOC of parser risk with no test coverage benefit, (3) both the JSON and C hex values are manually derived from the same spec sections, so drift between them would indicate a manual error in both places simultaneously. To add a new test vector: add the hex to wp11_test_openpgp.c AND update this file for human reference. wolfP11-7fr decision 2026-04-07.

description: COMPUTE DIGITAL SIGNATURE with 32-byte SHA-256 hash
